summary.scope: Home page (Figma node 1:32) — rebuild against new decomposition.

sections.notes: LOCKED. Hero already contains site-header, watermark, headline, founder/teacher card, AND the 4-card 'What we offer' strip (node 1:591). Do NOT touch this file. WhatWeDoSection (what-we-do-section.tsx) becomes redundant on the home page and must be removed from app/page.tsx only (file kept for other pages).

Existing component already matches intent: animates 8 Sanskrit terms (Yama..Samādhi) in a horizontal CSS marquee with hover-pause. Uses text-mini italic text-text-tertiary on bg-surface-cream with border-y border-border-2. Confirm Figma spacing (Figma calls for ~96px gap; current uses gap-24 = 96px — already correct). Likely needs only minor visual polish: confirm font-heading weight/italic matches Figma and that strip height (currently py-5) matches the Figma 73px band. Keep DEFAULT_TERMS array (already matches limb order in decomposition). Decomposition prop name `items` vs existing `terms` — prefer keeping `terms` to avoid touching callers.

EXISTS but shape diverges from Figma. Current API: eyebrow + 3-part split quote (lead/accent/trail) + long paragraphs on right — a TEXT-ONLY two-column layout. Figma wants TWO-COLUMN with portrait/photo on right (~578px wide) and single short quote + attribution on left. Extend in place: replace right-column paragraphs with an Image block (props: image.src, image.alt). Keep eyebrow + attribution. Decomposition copy: eyebrow 'Our practice', quote 'When a woman is empowered through yoga, her entire family, community, and future generations benefit.', attribution '—Acharya Ashok, Founder'. Container width target ~1233px (currently 1340).

EXISTS as a 2-col layout (left photo, right heading+subhead+bullets+CTA card) — structure already matches Figma intent. Extensions: (a) replace `subhead` with `intro` paragraph copy from decomposition; (b) update bullet copy to the 5 longer pillar strings (current bullets are shorter paraphrases); (c) replace the green filled CTA box at the bottom with a text-link 'Learn More →' (arrow-right icon, href=/about) — NOT a filled button per decomposition notes; (d) consider renaming prop `subhead` → `intro` and `innerHeading` → `pillarsTitle` to match decomposition (or accept both via defaults). Photo aspect 4/5 already correct. Container 1340 vs Figma 1202 — confirm in QA.

EXISTS as a 2-rail stacked section (ttcBlock + certificationBlock) — exactly the Figma structure. Extensions: (a) Figma wants DARK full-bleed background; switch bg-surface-1 → bg-brand-dark; (b) invert card and header text on dark bg (text-text-inverse / brand-shade); (c) each rail header is currently centered — Figma shows eyebrow+title left-aligned with a 'More Courses' link on the right; add moreLabel/moreHref to ProgramsBlock and render that link in the header row; (d) trim default cards to 3 per rail (current TTC has 6); (e) ensure each card shows a small 'Online' pill (already present in TtcCard via modeBadge); (f) second rail heading 'Regular yoga Courses' / eyebrow 'Teacher Training' per Figma (decomposition flags this as a likely designer copy bug — keep as-is for now). EXISTING HREFS TO PRESERVE (in the DEFAULT_TTC + DEFAULT_CERT arrays inside programs-grid-section.tsx): TTC cards → /programs/pranayama-nervous-system, /programs/300-hour-yoga-teacher-training-online, /programs/face-yoga-teacher-training, /programs/weight-loss-coach-teacher-training, /programs/bala-yoga-teacher-training, /programs/mat-pilates-teacher-training. CERT cards → /programs/certifications/weight-loss-coach, /programs/certifications/mudra-therapy, /programs/certifications/mat-pilates-instructor. 'More Courses' targets: decomposition wants /teacher-courses (TTC rail) and /yoga-courses (Regular rail) — both route trees exist (app/teacher-courses/online|offline, app/yoga-courses/*). Reusable card primitive ui/program-card.tsx is available but inline TtcCard/CertCard already do the job — prefer extending in place rather than swapping primitives.

EXISTS as eyebrow + heading + animated logo grid (3 or 4 cols). Figma wants 5×2 grid (8 logos) with two badge logos (RYS-300, RYS-200) pinned to the right edge WITHOUT captions. Extensions: (a) accept columns=5 OR refactor to a 'main grid + 2 highlighted badges to the right' layout; (b) add an `omitCaption: true` (or `variant: 'badge'`) flag per item so RYS-300/RYS-200 render larger circular badges with no caption; (c) item list per decomposition is 8 entries: AIVETC, Jyotish Yoga Sastra University, RYS-300, Yoga Alliance USA, Ministry of Ayush, Yoga Certification Board, PQMS, RYS-200. Eyebrow 'A Path to Wellness' (already the default) / heading 'We are recognised across the world'.

EXISTS as 3-col grid using TestimonialCard from ui/testimonial-card.tsx. Already matches Figma structure (eyebrow + heading + 3 cards). TestimonialCard renders quote glyph, avatar, name + meta on a card surface with framer-motion entrance + hover lift. Extensions: confirm card width target ~457px and gap=24 from Figma. Avatar position: decomposition says 'avatar at bottom', current card has avatar at TOP with quote below — flag for QA and likely reorder inside ui/testimonial-card.tsx (note: this primitive is shared with other pages; verify other consumers in QA before reordering).

EXISTS. SiteFooterBlock wraps ClosingCtaSection (apps/web/src/components/sections/closing-cta-section.tsx — the 'Begin where you are.' CTA, this IS the FinalCtaSection) + SiteFooter (4-column footer + legal bar) on the same dark band (bg-brand-dark in both). Extensions: (a) Confirm default CTA copy matches Figma — current default: eyebrow 'Bodhi', heading 'Begin where you are.', subhead 'Whether you want to teach, heal a specific thing, or simply move and breathe with people once a week — there's a door at Bodhi for that.', cta 'Try a class, free' → /contact. Decomposition body is shorter ('…once a week'); trim subhead to match Figma; (b) SiteFooter columns — Figma asks for {Brand, School, Visit, Stay close} (4 cols). Existing default has {Brand, Courses, About, Stay close, Visit} (5 cols). Pass custom columns/address from app/page.tsx for the home page rather than mutating the component default (other pages depend on Courses/About). EXISTING HREFS TO PRESERVE in DEFAULT_COLUMNS (site-footer-block.tsx lines 24-69): Courses → /teacher-courses/online, /teacher-courses/offline, /advanced-certifications/online, /yoga-courses/online, /pre-recorded-courses, /workshops; About → /about, /our-trainers, /our-centers, /blog, /tips-to-become-a-successful-yoga-teacher; Stay close → /contact, https://instagram.com/bodhischoolofyoga (external), https://youtube.com/@bodhischoolofyoga (external), mailto:hello@bodhischoolofyoga.com; Visit address → 'The Practice Room, / 2nd floor, Quiet Lane / City  ·  India' with 'Get directions →' → https://maps.google.com. Figma 'School' column maps to a SUBSET: Teacher Training → /teacher-courses (closest is /teacher-courses/online), Workshops → /workshops, Classes → /yoga-courses (closest /yoga-courses/online), Faculty → /our-trainers, Lineage → /about. Use these href targets in the home-page-specific columns prop.

removed_from_page.reason: No stats band in Figma 1:32 — drop from app/page.tsx render (do not delete the file; may be reused elsewhere).
'What we offer' 4-card strip is already part of hero-section.tsx (Figma node 1:591). Standalone WhatWeDoSection would duplicate it.

supporting_primitives_found.name: ProgramCard
supporting_primitives_found.status: available but not used by ProgramsGridSection; inline TtcCard/CertCard inside the section file do the job. Keep using inline cards to avoid swap-risk.

supporting_primitives_found.name: TestimonialCard
supporting_primitives_found.status: already used by TestimonialsSection. framer-motion entrance + hover lift, decorative quote glyph, avatar at top. Visual diff vs Figma (avatar position) to be confirmed in QA.

supporting_primitives_found.name: ClosingCtaSection
supporting_primitives_found.status: is the 'FinalCtaSection' — supports dark/light themes, optional 3-up cards. Use defaults with theme='dark' on home page.

supporting_primitives_found.name: SiteFooter
supporting_primitives_found.status: 4-col grid (brand + nav cols + address) + legal bar on bg-brand-dark. Existing default column set differs from Figma's home-page set — override columns/address via SiteFooterBlock props from app/page.tsx.

supporting_primitives_found.name: ProgramCard meta primitives
supporting_primitives_found.status: available if we end up extracting the inline TtcCard/CertCard markup.

warnings: DESIGN.md not present at repo root; design tokens are defined in apps/web/src/app/globals.css per MEMORY.md. Use those token names directly; no new tokens required by this decomposition.

ProgramsGridSection currently renders 6 TTC cards but Figma shows 3 per rail. Trim the default in the section file OR override via props from app/page.tsx. Preserving the 6 default hrefs is recommended even if only 3 render on the home page (other consumers may want all 6).

SiteFooter default columns ('Courses' + 'About') don't match Figma's home-page 'School' single column. Override via columns prop from app/page.tsx rather than mutating defaults (other pages depend on existing columns).

Decomposition prop names (items vs terms, intro vs subhead, pillarsTitle vs innerHeading) differ from existing component prop names. Build planner should decide whether to rename props (touches other consumers) or pass-through with adapters in app/page.tsx.
